scale: Aviva, MMC, multiple others in P&C and Specialty (Mosaic, Mcgill, Howden, Aventum, Apollo, Canopius)
transformation_philosophy:
Transformation to deliver efficiency within the entire Finance value chain. 

Target improvement in key metrics - DPO, DSO, rationalise month end close, cycle time reduction.

Solution would be positioned under the Finance One Office umbrella with individual solutions being categorised under one of these levers - Touchless, Liquidity Optimisation, Control & Compliance, Action Dashboards, Cost Reduction, Utilisation 

WNS will also likely position DENALI, SmartCube, OptiBuy and offer an end to end Procurement + Finance proposition.
digital_solutions:
▪Skense IDP Solution (Proprietary solution)
▪WNS CFO Trac is the end to end Finance suite with following components
   ▪P2P  (Invoice Automation, Supplier Portal, e-Invoicing, T&E, Vendor Recons, Duplicates Mgmt.) - Proprietary as well as parter solutions like JIFFY.AI, TradeShift etc. (some of the partner solutions are white listed)
   ▪Quote to Sustain (Cash Application, Collections Mgmt., Credit) - Partner solution Emagia
   ▪Record to Analyse (Close Mgmt., Journal Entry, Reconciliation) Proprietary as well as partner solutions like BlackLine.
▪Finance Intelligence in a box (FIAB) (Proprietary)
▪RPA (UIPath/AA/BluePrism)
▪Enabling workflows/case management solutions
showcase_clients: Aviva (975 FTEs across India and Sri Lanka)
